PolicyTemplateContainer.name: PrincipalPropagationForADK
PolicyTemplateContainer.title: Principal_Propogation_for_ADK
PolicyTemplateContainer.description: Sample policy template for Principal Propogation with Google Cloud Agent Development Kit - ADK. Adapted from https://github.com/SAP/apibusinesshub-api-recipes/tree/master/principalPropagation
PolicyTemplateContainer.proxyEndPointxml: <preFlow><name>PreFlow</name><request><isRequest>true</isRequest><steps><step><policy_name>extractInboundJWT</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>1</sequence></step><step><policy_name>dcodejwt</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>2</sequence></step><step><policy_name>readFromCache</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>3</sequence></step><step><policy_name>setConfigJson</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>4</sequence></step><step><policy_name>verifyIncomingJwt</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>5</sequence></step><step><policy_name>encodeCredForDest</policy_name><condition>myVar.destination.doQueryForFreshToken=="y"</condition><sequence>6</sequence></step><step><policy_name>getDestToken</policy_name><condition>myVar.destination.doQueryForFreshToken=="y"</condition><sequence>7</sequence></step><step><policy_name>parseDestResp</policy_name><condition>myVar.destination.doQueryForFreshToken=="y"</condition><sequence>8</sequence></step><step><policy_name>getAuthToken</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>9</sequence></step><step><policy_name>extractFinalToken</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>10</sequence></step><step><policy_name>prepareForRequest</policy_name><condition></condition><sequence>11</sequence></step><step><policy_name>cacheToken</policy_name><condition>myVar.destination.doQueryForFreshToken=="y"</condition><sequence>12</sequence></step><step><policy_name>setCSRFToken</policy_name><condition>(request.verb = "POST" OR request.verb = "PUT" OR request.verb = "DELETE")</condition><sequence>14</sequence></step><step><policy_name>getCSRFToken</policy_name><condition>(request.verb = "POST" OR request.verb = "PUT" OR request.verb = "DELETE")</condition><sequence>13</sequence></step></steps></request><response><isRequest>false</isRequest><steps></steps></response></preFlow><postFlow><name>PostFlow</name><request><isRequest>true</isRequest><steps></steps></request><response><isRequest>false</isRequest><steps></steps></response></postFlow><defaultFaultRule><name>defaultFaultRule</name><steps></steps></defaultFaultRule><postClientFlow><name>postClientFlow</name><response><steps></steps></response></postClientFlow>
